document.docAuthor: Zhou, Ya-Dong, Mwachala, Geoffrey, Hu, Guang-Wan & Wang, Qing-Feng
document.masterDocTitle: Annotated checklist of the vascular plants of Mount Kenya, East Africa

subSubSection.paragraph: Habitat: LMWF, LMDF, BZ; 1 300–3 000 m. Distribution: IIIa.
Voucher: Irangi Forest, Alt. 2 341 m, 15 Aug. 2015, SAJIT 004014 (EA).
References: Fries & Fries (1927b), Mayo (1985), Bussmann (1993, 1994), Bussmann & Beck (1995a, 1998), Agnew (2013).
